## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Firework and GrowthX to align on goals, target audience, and content strategy for driving organic traffic and lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary goal is to significantly increase organic traffic and meetings/leads from organic sources within 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Target audience is e-commerce leaders and marketing leaders at DTC brands in consumer electronics, fashion, and beauty verticals](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
  - [Currently limited content strategy, hiring new content manager to focus on blog posts and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2936.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage customer success stories/best practices in content](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)

## Topics

### Goals and Metrics

  - [Goal is 50% of all meetings (124 targeted per month) coming from organic sources in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [Currently \~3-4 organic MQLs per week, want to increase significantly](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Can is measured on generating outbound meetings (27/month) and inbound meetings (15/month)](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Ideal customers are DTC e-commerce brands with $200+ AOV in consumer electronics, fashion, beauty](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
  - [For SMBs, decision makers are C-levels, for mid-market/enterprise it's e-comm and marketing leaders](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
  - [Examples: Nicole at Fresh Market, Casey at another customer managing social/digital](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Limited content currently, 1 blog post since Can joined](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2936.0)
  - [Hiring Carissa as content manager to create blog posts, case studies, thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2944.0)
  - [Have \~2200 customers, many smaller ones open to being case studies](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=3014.0)
  - [No writers on staff currently, Carissa will be the main writer](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=3057.0)
  - [Opportunities around highlighting customer success stories, best practices](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=2915.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Can to share customer list, pitch decks, any other relevant internal info](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=3180.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up on availability for next sync, likely next week](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=3227.0)
  - [Coordinate recurring meeting cadence and involve Sadira](https://fathom.video/share/CrZbxLQkkigXWqxQDp6wMrbzuseHYV6a?tab=summary&timestamp=3373.0)
